settings.subtitle: Done hiding your smile in photos? The Elaren system works in three stages. A purple rinse that brightens on contact, enamel-safe strips that lift the deep stains, and a hands-free LED device that accelerates every session. Each stage sets up the next.

settings.custom_title: One routine. A visibly whiter smile.

settings.inventory_text: Free express shipping on every subscription

settings.text: Done hiding your smile in photos? The Elaren system works in three stages. A purple rinse that brightens on contact, enamel-safe strips that lift the deep stains, and a hands-free LED device that accelerates every session. Each stage sets up the next.

settings.benefit_4_text: Refills keep it going. Cancel anytime

settings.desc_var_1: One-time · The LED accelerator on its own · stage 3 without the rinse and strips that lift the stain · + $9.95 shipping
settings.desc_var_2: Subscribe & save · The full three-stage system · purple rinse, enamel-safe strips and the LED accelerator · save 40% on the device · free express shipping, always · refills land for $29
settings.desc_var_3: One-time · The full three-stage system plus a full quarter of refills · a 3-month supply · free express shipping

settings.text: ★ The Elaren Whitening Guarantee. Love your whiter smile or your money back. 30 days, no questions.

settings.custom_payment_icons: mastercard, american_express, apple_pay, google_pay, shopify_pay, visa, paypal

settings.subtitle_text: Rinse. Strip. Glow. Each stage sets up the next

settings.description: Run the routine for 30 days. Love your whiter smile or your money back. No questions.

settings.answer_1: No. Every stage of the system is gentle by design: enamel-safe strips, an alcohol-free purple rinse and a hands-free LED device. A brighter smile without the sting, even on sensitive teeth.
settings.question_2: Does it work on veneers or crowns?
settings.answer_2: No. Whitening only works on natural enamel, so veneers, crowns and fillings won't change shade. We'd rather tell you now than refund you later.
settings.answer_3: Yes. The strips are enamel-safe and the purple rinse is alcohol-free, gentle enough for daily use even on sensitive teeth.
settings.answer_4: It fits your morning. Rinse the purple mouthwash for about 30 seconds, wear the enamel-safe strips for around 30 minutes, and let the hands-free LED device accelerate them while you get ready.
settings.answer_5: You are covered by the Elaren Whitening Guarantee. Love your whiter smile or your money back, 30 days, no questions.

settings.review_text: My teeth look brighter after just a few days and the whole routine is so simple. No sensitivity for me.

settings.title: Brighten now
settings.description: Stage 1. The purple rinse cancels yellow tones on contact, so you look brighter from day one while the real whitening builds underneath.

settings.title: Lift the stain
settings.description: Stage 2. Enamel-safe strips do the deep work on set-in coffee, tea, wine and smoking stains that a rinse alone cannot shift.

settings.title: Accelerate, hands-free
settings.description: Stage 3. The LED device boosts every strip session while you get on with your morning, so the routine fits your life.

settings.title: Keep it up
settings.description: Refills arrive on schedule so the routine never stops. Skip, pause or cancel anytime.

settings.subtitle: The rinse shows results today. The strips build them for good. The device makes sure you never skip a session.

settings.review_text: Brighter smile in under two weeks and no sensitivity at all. So glad I tried it.
Gentle enough for my sensitive teeth and the results speak for themselves.
Easy routine that fits my day. My smile looks visibly whiter.
The hands-free device is brilliant. I whiten while I get ready.
Fresher breath and a brighter smile. The purple rinse is my favourite part.
A few shades whiter and it never felt harsh. Highly recommend the kit.
